title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DEL, GALLEGO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 307 / 55 OG No. 17, 3086 (April 27, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2108, April 03, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DEL, GALLEGO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following sitios are converted into barrios of the Municipality of Del Gallego, Province of Camarines Sur:

The sitio of Sinuknipan to be known as the barrio of Sinuknipan;

The sitio of Sabang to be known as the barrio of Sabang;

The sitio of Pasay to be known as the barrio of Pasay; and

The sitio of Bajo to be known as the barrio of San Juan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 3, 1959.
